title: Engineer Escalation Packet (V8.8)
description: Rigid handoff payload an engineer must emit when their attempt budget is exhausted. In Active Mini (V8.11) the implementer (Jack) emits on attempt 13; Marcus's runtime REJECTS non-conforming payloads, forcing the engineer into structured-failure mode instead of dumping raw conversational text that wastes Opus 4.7 input tokens on parsing.

last_attempted_code_ref.description: Git SHA, branch:commit, or absolute path to the last failed implementation. Never inline code body.

rtk_error_trace.description: RTK-compressed error trace. Must be RTK output, not raw stack. Marcus will reject if >8000 chars (RTK is required if your trace is bigger).

missing_dependencies.description: Package names or imported symbols the agent could not resolve.

tdd_red_tests.description: Test ids (file::test_name) that are red. At least one required — if no red test exists, you are escalating without a failure signal.

self_diagnosis.description: Agent's best-guess root cause. Optional but recommended. Free text capped at 1000 chars; Marcus uses as hint, not authority.

scope_paths_touched.description: Glob list of files the agent modified. Marcus uses to check scope creep.

rubric_score_at_failure.description: If outcome rubric was attached, the highest score achieved before exhaustion.
